name: Aegis
description: Runtime policy enforcement for AI agents. Cryptographic audit trail, human-in-the-loop approvals, kill switch. Zero code changes.
summaryZh: Runtime policy enforcement for AI agents. Cryptographic audit trail, human-in-the-loop approvals, kill switch. Zero code changes.                                                                          这是一类偏执行和编排的 AI 项目，适合拿来搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近活跃度很高，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
